description: Refactored the modal_base component to extract the CLOSE button into a sticky footer, ensuring it is always visible and consistent across all modals regardless of content height.
steps: Analyzed the layout difference between the Ask and Post modals.
Identified the flexing behavior with `mt-auto` on the CLOSE button causing spacing inconsistency.
Restructured `modal_base.html` to separate the scrollable form content (`flex-1`, `overflow-y-auto`) from a fixed bottom container.
Placed the CLOSE button inside the new sticky footer with appropriate padding (`px-6 py-4`) and aesthetics (`bg-earth-dark`).
Verified UI logic and ensured no templates were broken.
